title: PowerShell Runner Configuration
description: Configuration file for the PowerShell build & run script with pnpm support

projectName.description: Display name for the project shown in console output

rootDir.description: Root directory of the project (relative to script location). Empty or '.' means script location is root.

backendDir.description: Path to Go backend directory containing main.go or cmd/server/main.go

frontendDir.description: Path to React frontend directory containing package.json

distDir.description: Frontend build output directory (relative to frontendDir)

targetDir.description: Where to copy built frontend for serving by Go backend

dataDir.description: Data directory for SQLite databases and storage files

ports.description: Ports to open in Windows Firewall with -OpenFirewall flag

npm.description: Verify npm is available (deprecated, use pnpm)

prerequisites.description: Which prerequisites to check and auto-install

usePnp.description: Enable pnpm Plug'n'Play (PnP) mode for disk-efficient installs

pnpmStorePath.description: Path for pnpm shared store. Default: E:/.pnpm-store (shared across all projects).

cleanPaths.description: Paths to remove when using -Force flag. Supports wildcards.

runCommand.description: Command to start the Go backend

seedingDir.description: Directory for seed data files (created automatically)

configExampleFile.description: Template config file to copy if main config is missing

requiredModules.description: NPM modules that trigger reinstall if missing (catches new deps after git pull)

env.description: Environment variables to set before running commands

defaultProfile.description: Chrome/Edge profile folder name or display name to deploy to

browserExePath.description: Override browser executable path. Use for Chrome for Testing, Chromium, or custom browser installs. When empty, auto-detects based on -e flag.

chromeUserDataDir.description: Override Chrome user data directory. When empty, uses %LOCALAPPDATA%\Google\Chrome\User Data.

edgeUserDataDir.description: Override Edge user data directory. When empty, uses %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge\User Data.
